name: StampShield AI - A/E Liability Protection Platform
concept: AI-powered liability protection for A/E firms. Verifies license authority before document signing, maintains audit trails of all stamped drawings, and prevents unauthorized signatures that could void insurance or expose firms to liability.
target_market: A/E firms with significant liability exposure (10K firms doing commercial/infrastructure work)

practice_blocking_urgency.type: Liability Blocking - Insurance void, firm liability
practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Project stoppage $50K-500K/day, $25K-100K legal fees, reputation damage, potential firm bankruptcy

ai_advantage: Pre-signature verification: CAD plugin AI verifies license authority before stamp/seal is applied
Document audit trail: Blockchain-style record of all signed documents, licenses, timestamps
Risk scoring: ML analyzes project documents for signature liability risks
License status alerts: Real-time alerts when license expires or disciplinary action occurs
competitive_advantage: CAD software integration (AutoCAD, Revit, Civil 3D plugin)
primary_risks: Legal liability exposure for missed violations
Firms may hire internal compliance staff instead
sources: A/E professional liability insurance claims data
